verse_text: Also day by day, from the first day until the last day, he read from the Book of the Law of God. And they kept the feast seven days; and on the eighth day there was a sacred assembly, according to the prescribed manner.

links.context: It is noteworthy that an eighth day was added to this celebration (see [[NEH.8:13]]-18). This section of 2 Maccabees is referring to the feast of Hanukkah, which celebrates fire and light (see note at 1:9).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
